info.description: Compliance service API, providing audit logs, data retention policies, compliance checks, etc.
info.title: Compliance Service API

get.description: List all AI decision records (GDPR Article 22 compliance)

post.description: Record an AI automated decision result and basis

put.description: Update fields of a specified AI automated decision record

delete.description: Delete a specified AI decision record

post.description: Manually review an AI decision

get.description: Get detailed information of an AI decision record by ID
Paginated query of all audit findings

post.description: Create an audit finding record, including risk level and remediation plan

get.description: Get audit finding and remediation progress by ID

put.description: Update audit finding status, remediation progress, or assignee

delete.description: Delete a specified audit finding record

get.description: Paginated query of all data breach notification records

post.description: Create a data breach notification record (for tracking and compliance reporting)

put.description: Update data breach notification processing status

delete.description: Delete a specified data breach notification record

get.description: Get detailed information of a data breach notification by ID
List compliance certifications

post.description: Create a new compliance certification record

get.description: Get details of a specified compliance certification

put.description: Update certificate URL, audit date, audit body, next audit date, or certification status of a compliance certification record to track certification lifecycle

delete.description: Delete a specified compliance certification record

post.description: Create a history record of data purging (expired data deletion)

get.description: Paginated query of all cross-border data transfer records

post.description: Create a cross-border data transfer record (GDPR Chapter V compliance)

put.description: Update cross-border data transfer record information

delete.description: Delete a specified cross-border data transfer record

get.description: Get detailed information of a cross-border data transfer by ID
Paginated query of all data classification configurations

post.description: Create a data classification rule (e.g., PII / Sensitive / Internal)

put.description: Update classification level, description, or retention requirements of a data classification rule, supporting linkage by classification level (grade + Dengbao + ISO)

delete.description: Delete a specified data classification rule

get.description: Get detailed information of a data classification by ID
Paginated query of all Dengbao security control items

post.description: Create a Dengbao security control item record

put.description: Update status and evidence of a specified Dengbao security control item

delete.description: Delete a specified Dengbao security control item record

get.description: Paginated query of all compliance evidence files

post.description: Upload a compliance evidence file (e.g., audit document, screenshot)

get.description: Get detailed information of a compliance evidence by ID

put.description: Update fields of a specified compliance evidence

delete.description: Delete a specified compliance evidence file

get.description: Paginated query of all user consent records, filterable by purpose and user

post.description: Create a data processing consent record for a specified user

delete.description: Revoke a user's data processing consent for a specific purpose

get.description: Get detailed information of a single user consent record by ID
Paginated query of all Data Subject Access Requests (DSAR), filterable by status

post.description: Create a new Data Subject Access Request

get.description: Get detailed information of a Data Subject Access Request by ID

put.description: Update processing status or response content of a Data Subject Access Request

delete.description: Delete a specified Data Subject Access Request record

get.description: Paginated query of all right to erasure requests

post.description: Create a new right to erasure request (GDPR Article 17)

get.description: Get detailed information of an erasure request by ID

put.description: Update processing status of an erasure request

post.description: Execute an erasure request, actually deleting the corresponding user data

get.description: Paginated query of all HIPAA security control items

post.description: Create a HIPAA security control item record

put.description: Update status and evidence of a specified HIPAA security control item

delete.description: Delete a specified HIPAA security control item record

get.description: Paginated query of all ISO27001 security control items

post.description: Create an ISO27001 security control item record

put.description: Update status and evidence of a specified ISO27001 security control item

delete.description: Delete a specified ISO27001 security control item record

get.description: Get detailed information of an ISO27001 security control item by ID
Paginated query of all PCI DSS security control items

post.description: Create a PCI DSS security control item record

put.description: Update status and evidence of a specified PCI DSS security control item

delete.description: Delete a specified PCI DSS security control item record

get.description: Paginated query of all penetration test report records

post.description: Create a penetration test report record

put.description: Update penetration test report information

delete.description: Delete a specified penetration test report record

get.description: Paginated query of all PIPL security control items

post.description: Create a PIPL security control item record

put.description: Update status and evidence of a specified PIPL security control item

delete.description: Delete a specified PIPL security control item record

get.description: Paginated query of all Privacy Impact Assessment records

post.description: Create a Privacy Impact Assessment (e.g., privacy risk assessment before new feature launch)

put.description: Update content or status of a Privacy Impact Assessment

delete.description: Delete a specified Privacy Impact Assessment record

get.description: Get detailed information of a Privacy Impact Assessment by ID

post.description: Admin: Manage privacy policy versions. Update if version exists, otherwise create new version.

put.description: Create or update tenant compliance configuration

get.description: Paginated query of all PSD2 security control items

post.description: Create a PSD2 security control item record

put.description: Update status and evidence of a specified PSD2 security control item

delete.description: Delete a specified PSD2 security control item record

get.description: Paginated query of all regulatory monitoring items

post.description: Create a regulatory update monitoring record

put.description: Update regulatory monitoring item information

delete.description: Delete a specified regulatory monitoring record

get.description: Paginated query of all data retention policy configurations

post.description: Create a data retention policy (data type, retention period, legal basis)

put.description: Update data retention policy parameters

delete.description: Delete a specified data retention policy

get.description: Execute segregation of duties check to detect role conflicts
Paginated query of all segregation of duties rules

post.description: Create a segregation of duties rule (define mutually exclusive role combinations)

put.description: Update name, role groups, or enabled status of a segregation of duties rule. When enabled, prevents assigning mutually exclusive roles to the same user.

delete.description: Delete a specified segregation of duties rule

get.description: Paginated query of all SOX IT General Control records

post.description: Create a new SOX ITGC control item record

put.description: Update status, test results, etc. of a SOX ITGC control item

delete.description: Delete a specified SOX ITGC control item

get.description: Get detailed information of a SOX ITGC control item by ID
get.summary: Get SOX ITGC control item details

get.description: Return a list of all supported compliance standards (GDPR, ISO27001, SOC2, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, etc.), including name, version, category, and description

post.description: Reload all compliance standard definition files from the file system, updating the in-memory cache

get.description: Get complete information of a compliance standard by standard ID, including all control items with requirements, parameters, operators, and target values
List all control items of a specified compliance standard, each including requirement description, parameters, operator, target value, and severity level
GDPR Article 28 compliance: List all sub-processor information

post.description: Add a new sub-processor record (GDPR Article 28 compliance)

get.description: Get detailed information of a sub-processor

put.description: Update sub-processor information

delete.description: Delete a specified sub-processor record

post.description: Runs compliance gap analysis against the calling tenant (tenant_id derived from JWT context)
post.summary: Run gap analysis for current tenant

get.description: Query all compliance parameter override configurations for the current tenant

post.description: Create a compliance parameter override configuration for the current tenant

delete.description: Delete a compliance override configuration for a specified parameter

get.description: Returns the resolved compliance policy for the calling tenant (tenant_id derived from JWT context)
get.summary: Get resolved policy for current tenant

post.description: Returns compliance readiness report against a standard for the calling tenant
post.summary: Get readiness report for current tenant

get.description: Returns the security compliance score for the calling tenant (tenant_id derived from JWT context)
get.summary: Get compliance score for current tenant

put.description: Updates the compliance standards configuration for the calling tenant (tenant_id derived from JWT context)
put.summary: Update compliance standards for current tenant

post.description: Compare the tenant's current configuration with the resolved compliance policy parameters to calculate compliance gaps and score

get.description: Resolve and return the merged compliance check parameter policy based on the tenant's selected compliance standards

post.description: Evaluate the tenant's current configuration readiness for certification against a specified compliance standard, returning non-passing control items and remediation suggestions

get.description: Calculate a security score (0-100) based on the tenant's compliance status, returning overall score and grade

put.description: Update the list of compliance framework standards enabled by the tenant, triggering automatic initialization of standard control items and policy merging

get.description: Paginated query of all vendor security risk assessment records

post.description: Create a security risk assessment for a specified vendor

put.description: Update vendor risk assessment result and risk level

delete.description: Delete specified vendor risk assessment record

get.description: Query data cleanup (expired data deletion) history
User views own data subject access request history

post.description: User self-submits data subject access request, user_id extracted from JWT token automatically

get.description: User views current status of own data subject access request
Public endpoint: Get current effective privacy policy version
Public endpoint: Get all version history of privacy policy
Public endpoint: Get current tenant's data retention policy disclosure
Get current tenant's compliance configuration (DPO, retention policies, enabled frameworks, etc.)
Trust Center: Get audit finding list (anonymized, only high/critical level)
Trust Center: Get data breach notifications (anonymized, no auth, only published notifications)
Get all public SOC2/ISO compliance certifications (no auth). Used by Trust Center.

parameters.description: Certification framework filter (SOC2 Type II, ISO 27001)
parameters.name: framework

get.description: Trust Center: Get cross-border data transfer information (no auth)
Trust Center: Get data classification information (no auth)
Trust Center: Get Dengbao control item list (no auth, summary level)
Trust Center: Get compliance evidence file list summary (no auth, P2, no specific file URLs)
Trust Center: Get HIPAA control item list (no auth, summary level)
Trust Center: Get ISO27001 control item list (no auth, summary level)
Trust Center: Get PCI DSS control item list (no auth, summary level)
get.summary: Get public PCI DSS control items

get.description: Trust Center: Get penetration test report summary (no auth, summary level only)
Trust Center: Get PIPL control item list (no auth, summary level)
Trust Center: Get privacy impact assessment summary list (no auth)
Trust Center: Get PSD2 control item list (no auth, summary level)
Trust Center: Get regulatory change tracking information (no auth, P2)
Trust Center: Calculate and return security score (no auth)
Trust Center: Get system-level compliance status overview (no auth)
Trust Center: GDPR Art.28 required sub-processor disclosure list (no auth)
Get current tenant's overall compliance status overview (framework coverage, violation count, etc.)
Internal service call from identity-service etc., returns merged policy parsed from tenant's selected compliance standards

has_next.description: HasNext indicates whether there is a next page

has_prev.description: HasPrev indicates whether there is a previous page

page.description: Page is the current page number (1-based)

page_size.description: PageSize is the number of items per page

total.description: Total is the total number of items across all pages

total_pages.description: TotalPages is the total number of pages

bearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
bearerAuth.name: Authorization
